texto: The more we understand how we individually operate, the easier it is for us to understand that we are all similar..from the same human race;doing the best we can based on the programmings that we've each acquired. Then, we never have to take things personally, because then we comprehend the fact that we are just like birds: same race, same tribe, but flying with different types of wings." :)
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Dr. Jacent Mpalyenkana: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “The more we understand how we individually operate, the easier it is for us to understand that we…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que motivacao, author, empowerment pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de inspiracao e termino.
